papers.title: Attention Is All You Need: A Transformer Architecture for Machine Learning
papers.summary: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks. This paper presents a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.

papers.title: Large Language Models: A Survey of Recent Advances and Applications
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized natural language processing. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of recent advances in LLM development, training methodologies, and applications across various domains.

papers.title: Efficient Fine-tuning of Language Models for Downstream Tasks
papers.summary: Fine-tuning pre-trained language models for specific downstream tasks is a critical step in NLP. This paper proposes efficient fine-tuning methods that reduce computational requirements while maintaining model performance.
